full_description: Step Challenge is a fitness app that encourages users to stay active by tracking their daily steps and competing with friends. It offers rewards and leaderboards to motivate users to reach their fitness goals. With Step Challenge, you can set daily step targets, monitor your progress, and compare your performance with friends. The app provides a fun and engaging way to stay motivated and active. Key features include: daily step tracking, friend competitions, rewards and leaderboard, customizable step targets, and integration with wearable devices. Download Step Challenge now and take the first step towards a healthier, more active you.
